titleStmt.title: SII 36.242: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 242. (A.R. No. 242 of 1910.) NARASIṄGAPURAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Narasimha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: (Śaka 1455, Vijaya, Mēsham, ba., 3, Friday, = A.D. 1533, March 28, Friday.)

The inscription records the appointment of Chiṅgayaṉ, the son of Mātinēthi Mallaiyar, as the watchman of the temple of Lakshmi Narasimhamūrti in Narasānāyakkapuram by Tīttāra Piḷḷai of Kāñchipuram, the secretary of the king. For his services in the temple, the watchman was assigned one house, a monthly remuneration of 6 paṇams, a share in the temple prasādam and some share in the dishes (paṇiyāram) from the temple. He was also given a daily allowance of one uḻakku of oil for lighting a lamp (vācal viḷakku) in front of the temple gate.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī man makāmaṇṭalecura rājātirāja rājaparameśvara śrī vīrapratāpa Accutadeva mahārāyar prathivirājyam paṇṇi Aṟuḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 5kku me
ṟ cellāniṉṟa vijaya samvatsarattu meṣa nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tritiyaiyum śukravāramum peṟṟa Iṟṟaiṉāḷ Accutadeva mahārāyar kāriyattukkuk kaṟtarāṉa kāñcipuram tīt
tārapiḷḷai narasāṉāyakkapurattil lakṣminarasimhamurtti koyil vācalkāvalukku mātineti mallaiyar makaṉ ciṅkayaṉukku kāṇiyāṭciyākak kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭi māsam
Oṉṟukku paṇam Āṟum dinam Oṉṟukku kuṟuṇi prasādamum vakaikku Oru tiruppaṇyāramum vācal viḷakkukku dinam Uḻakkeṇṇaiyum koyilukku melai
tteruvil vaṭaciṟakil kīḻai maṉaikku Aṭuttamelai maṉai Oṉṟum Ācandrātkamāka putra pautra pārampariyamāka Aṉupavikkakaṭavarākavum §
Digital edition of SII 36.242 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
